title: Pan-Seared Broccoli with Northern Thai Spices
description: A flavorful and healthy vegetarian dish that combines the nutty taste of broccoli with aromatic northern Thai spices.

ingredients.name: Northern Thai spices
ingredients.notes: Blend of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

instructions: 1. Rinse the broccoli under cold water and pat dry with a paper towel.
2. Heat the aerated olive oil in a large skillet or wok over high heat.
3. Add the northern Thai spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Add the broccoli and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender but still crisp.
5. Stir in the purple rice vinegar and cook for an additional minute.
6. Garnish with sprouting broccoli florets, if using.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
